# Speak Malayalam — speakmalayalam.com

> Free spoken (casual / colloquial) Malayalam lessons for English speakers, created by Dr. Reshmi R Nair, PhD. Includes audio conversations with transcripts, a free 30-day course, flashcards, quizzes, spaced-repetition review, and 1-to-1 online classes. All Malayalam is everyday spoken language, not formal/textbook.

## Core pages
- [Speak Malayalam (home)](https://speakmalayalam.com/): Free spoken-Malayalam lessons for beginners, NRIs, partners of Malayalis and travellers.
- [Listen & Learn — 24 casual audio conversations + transcripts](https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-listen.html): Short, slow, casual Malayalam dialogues with Malayalam, romanised and English transcripts.
- [Free 30-Day Spoken Malayalam Course](https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-day-01.html): One bite-size spoken lesson a day, with audio.
- [Malayalam Phrasebook](https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-phrasebook.html): Common everyday Malayalam phrases.
- [Practice Arena (quizzes)](https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-practice.html): Quick quizzes with instant feedback.
- [Flashcards](https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-flashcards.html): Flip-and-learn drills with native audio.
- [Daily Review (spaced repetition)](https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-review.html): Reviews words right before you forget them.
- [2-minute Level Test](https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-level-test.html): Find your starting level.

## About
- Dr. Reshmi R Nair, PhD — teaches casual, everyday spoken Malayalam (not textbook) to complete beginners, NRIs, spouses/partners of Malayalis, and travellers to Kerala. Offers free self-study tools plus paid 1-to-1 online lessons.
